name: Sprinto Compliance Automation API
what_it_does: Sprinto REST API for compliance automation platform targeting startups and high-growth SaaS companies. Enables AI agents to monitor compliance control status, track evidence collection, retrieve security training completion, manage risk assessments, and integrate Sprinto compliance data into security and HR workflows. Sprinto focuses on automated, continuous compliance monitoring.
use_cases: Monitoring compliance control status and gaps from security monitoring agents
Tracking security awareness training completion from HR compliance agents
Retrieving risk register and assessment data from risk management agents
Integrating Sprinto compliance status into security operations reporting agents
not_for: Large enterprises with complex multi-framework legacy compliance (consider Hyperproof or AuditBoard)
Non-cloud SaaS companies without modern infrastructure
best_when: A startup or high-growth SaaS company using Sprinto for SOC2 or ISO 27001 wants AI agents to monitor continuous compliance status and integrate security training data into HR workflows.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Compliance control configurations and risk data are security-sensitive. Restrict API access to security and compliance personnel.

auth.notes: Sprinto API access via API key. Available to enterprise customers. Contact Sprinto for API access setup. India-based company with global customer base.

pricing.paid_tiers: Startup and Enterprise plans; pricing per compliance framework
pricing.notes: India-headquartered startup compliance platform. Competitive pricing vs Vanta/Drata for startups.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Compliance control configurations are security-sensitive
No public MCP server — enterprise API key required
API documentation not publicly available — enterprise customers only
India-headquartered company — verify data residency for EU/US compliance requirements
Sprinto focuses on startups — API maturity may lag Vanta or Drata for enterprise use cases
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Security compliance control data. SOC2, GDPR. API key auth. India HQ — verify data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Security compliance data. SOC2, GDPR. API key auth. Verify data residency — India HQ.
